title: TemplateTexures
description: This is a texture pack that has nothing inside other than vanila you can edit and change this however you want
body:
## How to Edit
 

```
Step 1 unzip
Step 2 open and edit the .mcpack (discription).
Step 3 edit the text splashes in the file texts.
Step 4 edit the images for the blocks just keep file name as is 
Step 5 Optional edit GUI and background and other stuff if needed.
Step 6 rename and rezip.
```

END

**ADDED DIRECTORIES V3:** Fonts, Audio, GUI, Block Texture and more

**Additional Resources:**
- Check out more content on [My Website](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/)
- Join our [Discord](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/) server to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions.
Thank you for your support! ❤️
